title: Core Components of a Blockchain
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental elements of a blockchain and how they interconnect to form a secure, decentralized ledger.
relationships: Transactions are bundled into a Block. Each Block contains its own Hash and the Hash of the Previous Block, creating a chain. The chain of blocks forms a Distributed Ledger that is shared across a Peer-to-Peer Network. Network participants use a Consensus Mechanism to agree on the validity of new blocks before they are added to the chain.
